title: 2024514Dry
summary:
Main
· Dry Bulk Spot Rate Volatility Points to Ongoing Positional Imbalances Amidst Solid Volumes - After bottoming in the high-teens, the Capesize Spot Index posted a solid recovery , pushing freight rates back towards the high-20,000 level, in line with where the futures market has been trading for weeks now. The Atlantic market remains the most volatile area where rates managed to surge from 8,000 to 33,000 in less than a week. Such positional imbalances, combined with solid sentiment for the overall shipping sector, are the main reasons for the elevated volatility the market has observed so far this year.
